text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run into Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse at a
sporting goods store.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also encounter Happy Meek as she continues
training late into the night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All three are making an effort to help out the
trainers they trust so much before embarking on
their third year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inspired by their example, I vow to work even
harder with <chrname> as we head
towards our goal!
